Framework Features

Powerful Features

Built for modern development with cutting-edge technologies and developer-friendly tools

Core Features

Everything You Need to Build

Comprehensive toolkit for creating professional admin dashboards and modern websites

Bootstrap 5.3.7

Latest Bootstrap framework with utility classes, responsive grid system, and modern components for rapid development.

  • Responsive Grid System
  • Utility Classes
  • Modern Components
  • CSS Custom Properties

Astro 5.12.4

Modern static site generator with component islands, zero-JS by default, and optimal performance.

  • Component Islands
  • Zero JS by Default
  • Hot Module Reload
  • SEO Optimized

Remix Icon 4.7.0

Complete icon library with 3000+ professional, scalable vector icons for every use case.

  • 3000+ Icons
  • SVG & Web Fonts
  • Consistent Design
  • Open Source

Modular Architecture

Reusable components that work across admin and frontend contexts, promoting consistency and efficiency.

  • Reusable Components
  • Layout Systems
  • Template Library
  • Cross-Context Usage

Easy Customization

SCSS variables and mixins make theme customization straightforward with comprehensive styling options.

  • SCSS Variables
  • Custom Mixins
  • Theme System
  • Color Schemes

Enhanced Documentation

Context7-powered documentation system for better developer experience and comprehensive guides.

  • Interactive Examples
  • API Reference
  • Code Snippets
  • Search Functionality
Developer Experience

Built for Developers

Modern development workflow with tools and features that enhance productivity

Development Tools

Comprehensive tooling for linting, formatting, and building with modern standards.

ESLint Integration
Prettier Formatting
Stylelint CSS
TypeScript Support
Bundle Analysis
Hot Reload

Build System

Optimized build pipeline with asset processing, code splitting, and production optimization.

Asset Optimization
Code Splitting
CSS Purging
Image Processing
Static Generation
Offline Support
Performance

Built for Speed

Optimized for performance with modern web technologies and best practices

Performance Optimizations

Zero JavaScript by Default

Astro ships zero JavaScript by default, only loading JS when needed for interactive components.

Component Islands

Interactive components are isolated islands, preventing unnecessary JavaScript downloads.

Static Site Generation

Pre-rendered static files for optimal loading speed and SEO performance.

Optimized Assets

Automatic image optimization, CSS purging, and asset compression for faster loading.

95+

Lighthouse Score

<1s

First Load

50KB

Base Bundle

100%

SEO Ready

Framework Comparison

Why Choose Astero UI?

See how Astero UI compares to other frameworks and template solutions

Traditional Templates
  • Static HTML files
  • Limited customization
  • No build system
  • Manual updates
  • Basic documentation
Component Libraries
  • Reusable components
  • No complete layouts
  • Complex setup
  • Good documentation
  • Steep learning curve
Recommended
Astero UI
  • Complete framework
  • Modern build system
  • Easy customization
  • Context7 documentation
  • Production ready
Ready to Start?

Experience All Features Today

Download Astero UI and start building with all these powerful features included
